title: Test Strategy, Contracts, Properties, and Mutation · Failure Case: Flaky Tests
summary: Design a layered test suite around risks rather than file counts. Planned artifact: Add and verify the gates flaky tests increment in a risk-to-test coverage matrix. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Detect, quarantine briefly, diagnose, and remove nondeterminism with ownership.
Use mutation analysis selectively to find assertions that do not detect behavior changes.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
